item.title: A safe space for girls who've faced sexual violence

item.title: This behavior can be a turning point for families caring for a dementia patient
item.description: Wandering, and "elopement," are frightening and dangerous behaviors by people with dementia. For some families, it is the point when they begin to see...

item.title: Primary care is in trouble. Doctors are banding together to increase market power
item.description: As costs increase, primary care practices are joining forces in Independent Physician Associations. The goal is to leverage better insurance contracts...

item.title: Is that carb ultra-processed? Here's a test even a kid can do
item.description: The latest nutrition guidelines urge Americans to avoid highly processed food. But when it comes to carbs, many people don't know which ones are ultra...

item.title: Photos: The flying doctors of Lesotho won't let their wings be clipped
item.description: This band of airborne health workers bring essential medical care to isolated communities in the southern African nation. In addition to turbulence, t...
